_schema.coefficients_order: [A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H] — NIST WebBook Shomate convention
_schema.units: Cp in J/mol/K, H in kJ/mol, S in J/mol/K, T in K

formulas.Cp: A + Bt + Ct^2 + Dt^3 + E/t^2  [J/mol/K], t = T/1000
formulas.S: A*ln(t) + Bt + Ct^2/2 + Dt^3/3 - E/(2t^2) + G  [J/mol/K]

_schema.note_on_F: F must satisfy: A*t298 + B*t298^2/2 + ... + F = delta_f_H298 [kJ/mol], where t298=0.29815. F is NOT the raw NIST table value; compute it as F = delta_f_H298 - (polynomial sum at t=0.29815).
_schema.adding_species: 1) Look up coefficients from https://webbook.nist.gov 2) Compute F so that H(298.15K) = delta_f_H298 [kJ/mol] 3) Verify Cp, H, S at 298.15 K against JANAF/NIST reference values
